name: Mooré
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Mooré is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Mooré (Mossi) is a Gur (Atlantic-Congo) language, the principal language of Burkina Faso, written in the Latin script with Africa-Alphabet letters (ɛ ɩ ʋ ɔ ŋ) and nasal vowels; it is tonal and tone is not marked in ordinary orthography.
